title: Shri Annapurna Mata Ji Ki Aarti
intro: Read Shri Annapurna Mata Ji Ki Aarti in Hindi and seek the divine blessings of Goddess Annapurna.
description:
Barambar pranam,
Maiya barambar pranam.
Jo nahi dhyave vishram Ambike,
Kahan vishram.
Annapurna Devi naam tihare,
Lete hot sab kaam॥
॥ Barambar pranam ॥

Pralay yugantar aur janmantar,
Kalantar tak naam.
Sur suron ki rachna karte hain,
Kahan Krishna kahan Ram॥
॥ Barambar pranam ॥

Mitrahi charan chaturanana,
Charu chakradarshyam.
Chandrachood chandranan chakra,
Shobha lakhahi lalam॥
॥ Barambar pranam ॥

Devi antim dev dasha mein,
Daya daya tav naam.
Trahi-trahi sharnagat vatsal,
Sharan roop tav dham॥
॥ Barambar pranam ॥

Shreem, Hreem, Shraddha, Shreem Aieem Vidya,
Shreem Kleem Kamal Kaam.
Kantibhrantimi kanti shantimayivar,
Detu nishkaam॥
॥ Barambar pranam ॥
